mapper.select: select round(avg(br.score), 1) from business_rating br where br.product_id = #{productId}

select p.id, p.name, p.business_id, p.category_id, pc.name categoryName, p.description, p.price, p.stock, p.sales, p.status, p.updated_time from product p left join product_category pc on p.category_id = pc.id where p.business_id = #{businessId} and p.is_delete = 1 and not exists ( select 1 from business_rating br where br.product_id = p.id and br.user_id = #{userId} ) order by p.updated_time desc
